summary: EXP-218 addresses H2 (major) — dome-falsifiability silent deletion in SEC-5.0 ks-april-2026-update via a two-paragraph replacement (paragraph 1 "Credit the criterion" and paragraph 2 "What the criterion does to this page"). EXP-218 resolves this issue together with the other six c2 holes (ISS-1288/1289/1290/1291/1292/1293/1295) as a single paragraph-level surgery: H1 fixed by replacing the ambiguous "survive" verb with "left untouched" framing and an explicit per-row walkthrough; H2 fixed by adding a qualification flagging the asymmetric deletion of the dome-falsifiability commitment; H3 fixed by walking all six rows against the three-prong test; H4 softened to explicit "on our reading"; H5 anchored with Lakatos 1970 citation; H6 replaced with "careful reviewer" phrasing; H8 kicker updated to "honest row-by-row application". H7 (TLDR "precisely") explicitly NOT addressed — flagged as standing c1 finding for a separate targeted edit. Both original paragraphs are unique string matches in data/sections.json part5.html (occurrence count = 1 each on 2026-04-22). Surrounding elements (details/summary/TLDR/before-after rule table/CSS-class paragraph/OTS concession paragraph) are untouched. Word count grows 275 → ~470 across both paragraphs. Safe to self-apply as a two-paragraph text replacement.
